with:
  # Build clause fragments, avoiding duplicate subject mentions
          parts = []
          for t in remaining_items:
              d = phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object)
              # If the descriptor already contains the subject (e.g., "Frank Borman was a crew memb...
              # we use it as‑is; otherwise we prepend the subject.
              if subj in d and not d.lower().startswith(subj.lower()):
                  parts.append(d.rstrip('.'))
              else:
                  parts.append(f"{subj} {d}")
          if not parts:
              sentences.append(f"{subject_phrase}.")
              continue
          if len(parts) == 1:
              sent = f"{parts[0]}."
          else:
              # Join all but last with commas, add conjunction before the final part
              body = ", ".join(parts[:-1])
              sent = f"{body}, and {parts[-1]}."
          sentences.append(sent)
